mapper.update: update notice set bhit = bhit + 1 where bno = #{bno}
mapper.select:
select n.bno, n.btitle, n.bcontent, n.bfile, n.bhit, n.emp_id, n.com_id, n.created_at, n.updated_at, e.emp_name as empName from notice n join employee e on n.emp_id = e.emp_id where n.com_id = #{comId}
and (lower(n.btitle) like lower('%' || #{keyword} || '%') or lower(n.bcontent) like lower('%' || #{keyword} || '%'))
order by
n.bhit desc n.created_at desc
OFFSET #{pstartno} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{onepagelist} ROWS ONLY
select count(*) from notice where com_id = #{comId}

select count(*) from notice where com_id = #{comId}
and (lower(btitle) like lower('%' || #{keyword} || '%') or lower(bcontent) like lower('%' || #{keyword} || '%'))
